metadata.title: Ibrahim Dayende OUGDA - Full-stack Dev & Growth Media Buyer
metadata.description: I build modern web and mobile products, automate with AI, and help brands grow with Meta & Google Ads.

hero.description: I help startups, founders, and brands build high-performance web and mobile products, automate processes with AI, and drive measurable results with Meta & Google Ads.

services.title: Services designed to grow your product
services.description: A mix of development, acquisition, and automation to launch faster, convert better, and save time.

web.title: Custom Web Development
web.description: Fast, scalable sites and apps built for conversion, designed to turn visitors into users or customers.

mobile.title: Flutter Mobile
mobile.description: Maintainable, high-performance mobile apps connected to your APIs and ready to scale.

ads.title: Ads & Acquisition
ads.description: Meta & Google Ads campaigns focused on ROI, with clear tracking, continuous testing, and data-driven decisions.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.description: Smart automations to reduce repetitive tasks, connect your tools, and save time every day.

services.microProof: Pragmatic approach | Clear communication | Iterative delivery

projects.title: Concrete projects, measurable impact
projects.description: Solutions designed to solve real problems, with a focus on performance and growth.
projects.ctaPrompt: Have a similar project in mind?

meta-ads-conversations.title: Meta Ads Campaigns - Conversation & Engagement Generation
meta-ads-conversations.description: Management and optimization of Facebook & Instagram ad campaigns focused on WhatsApp & Messenger conversations and engagement. Daily and lifetime budgets, CPC, cost per conversation, reach, impressions, and continuous optimization.
meta-ads-conversations.impact: Impact: 3.6M+ impressions, 577k+ people reached -> stronger visibility; 5,000+ WhatsApp & Messenger conversations -> higher engagement; cost per conversation as low as $0.18 -> efficient ROI.

kawari-finance-app.title: Kawari Finance App
kawari-finance-app.description: Finance management app to track expenses and income and visualize budgets with AI.
kawari-finance-app.impact: Impact: budget visibility -> clearer decisions; AI recommendations -> better financial discipline.

sud-stratvision.title: SUD-StratVision - Strategic Management Platform
sud-stratvision.description: Strategic management platform centralizing goals, performance, leave, training, and missions through an interactive dashboard.
sud-stratvision.impact: Impact: centralized objectives -> faster decisions; HR tracking -> optimized management.

clinic-appointment-scheduler.title: Clinic Appointment Scheduler
clinic-appointment-scheduler.description: Mobile app for booking, managing, and tracking medical appointments for patients, doctors, and admins.
clinic-appointment-scheduler.impact: Impact: appointment digitization -> smoother patient journey; real-time tracking -> stronger clinic coordination.

offline-gpt.title: Offline GPT
offline-gpt.description: Research project to run a GPT-like assistant locally without internet access.
offline-gpt.impact: Impact: offline AI solutions -> increased accessibility in low-connectivity contexts.
offline-gpt.microcopy: Work in progress - contributions and feedback welcome.

make-social-automation.title: Social Media Posting Automation (Facebook & Instagram)
make-social-automation.description: Full social media posting automation using Make (formerly Integromat). The system fetches content from Google Sheets, posts to Facebook Pages and Instagram Business, and updates status in the tracking sheet.
make-social-automation.impact: Impact: significant time savings -> faster operations; reduced human errors -> consistent quality; centralized multi-platform publishing -> scalable workflow.

telegram-youtube-summarizer.title: AI Telegram Bot - Automatic YouTube Video Summaries
telegram-youtube-summarizer.description: AI Telegram bot that detects YouTube links, fetches transcripts via API, cleans the text, generates AI summaries, and returns clear, formatted responses.
telegram-youtube-summarizer.impact: Impact: automated video summaries -> time saved; faster monitoring -> better learning; modular architecture -> easy evolution.

bfa-administration-assistant.title: BFA Administration Assistant
bfa-administration-assistant.description: Digital admin assistant to manage tasks and administrative data in a local institutional context.
bfa-administration-assistant.impact: Impact: fewer manual tasks -> time saved for agents; formalized processes -> more reliable service.

sud-develop-website.title: SUD Develop Website
sud-develop-website.description: Multilingual corporate website presenting divisions, products, news, and services with a quote request module.
sud-develop-website.impact: Impact: stronger digital visibility -> more qualified leads; clearer offer -> improved conversion.

anam-meteo-eval.title: ANAM Meteo Eval
anam-meteo-eval.description: Project to analyze and evaluate weather data to measure quality, reliability, and consistency.
anam-meteo-eval.impact: Impact: continuous evaluation -> improved data quality; reliable indicators -> stronger climate decisions.

cv-studio.title: CV Studio
cv-studio.description: Web app to create and customize modern resumes through an interactive interface.
cv-studio.impact: Impact: profile valorization -> improved employability; guided creation -> smooth user experience.

gestion-bibliotheque.title: Library Management
gestion-bibliotheque.description: Library management system to track books, loans, and users through a secure interface.
gestion-bibliotheque.impact: Impact: loan tracking -> fewer losses; automated operations -> time savings.

bytemarket.title: ByteMarket
bytemarket.description: E-commerce site built in vanilla HTML/CSS/JS with clear product navigation and a smooth checkout experience.
bytemarket.impact: Impact: simplified purchase flow -> higher conversion; clear catalog -> faster navigation.

about.title: A hybrid profile to deliver fast, clean, and with method
about.description: I combine development, marketing, and automation to turn ideas into concrete products. I work with a pragmatic, structured approach, focused on results, clear communication, and fast execution - from scoping to deployment.
about.location: Based in West Africa, I work with local and international teams on real-impact projects.
